_comment: TEMPLATE ONLY. Copy this to a PRIVATE, GITIGNORED file (e.g. .predisclose.local.json
at your repo root, or anywhere and point PREDISCLOSE_RULES / --rules at it).
Put your real internal identifiers here - they must NOT be committed.
All values below are deliberately fake placeholders.
Rule fields: id, pattern (Python regex), severity (low|medium|high),
message, suggestion, flags (any of i,m,s). 'allow' is a list of literal
strings; a match equal to an allow entry is dropped (e.g. public names that
look internal but are intentionally public).

rules.suggestion: use a public codename or 'the app server'
remove reference to the private project
